product.body_html:
If your nerves feel like they're on fire — burning, tingling, or going numb — your body may be screaming for this one molecule.

Most people have never heard of R-Alpha Lipoic Acid. But researchers have. It's been studied for decades as one of the most powerful antioxidants the human body can use — because unlike most antioxidants, it works in both fat and water environments. That means it protects virtually every cell you have. The "R" form is critical: it's the natural, body-identical isomer your mitochondria actually recognise and use. The synthetic "S" form — found in cheap supplements — is half-useless at best. Romira uses only the pure R form at 600mg, the dose used in clinical studies on nerve health and blood sugar regulation.

R-ALA also does something no other antioxidant can: it regenerates vitamins C and E after they've been used up, essentially recycling your antioxidant defence system. It improves insulin sensitivity by activating glucose transporters in muscle cells. And it crosses the blood-brain barrier, protecting neurons from oxidative damage. If you're dealing with nerve pain, numbness, blood sugar swings, or just want serious anti-aging protection — this is the compound.

Key Benefits

  • ✓ Relieves nerve burning, tingling, and neuropathy symptoms
  • ✓ Improves insulin sensitivity and blood sugar regulation
  • ✓ Boosts mitochondrial energy production at the cellular level
  • ✓ Regenerates vitamins C and E — amplifying your antioxidant defences
  • ✓ Crosses the blood-brain barrier to protect neurons
  • ✓ Pure R-form only — the biologically active, body-identical isomer
  • ✓ 600mg clinical-strength dose per capsule

Formulation

Each capsule delivers 600mg of pure R-Alpha Lipoic Acid (R-ALA) — the natural enantiomer, not the synthetic racemic blend. No fillers, no S-form dilution. Just the compound your body recognises.

Who It's For

People experiencing nerve pain, tingling or burning sensations, diabetic neuropathy, or anyone looking for serious antioxidant and metabolic support.

Stop managing symptoms — start addressing the root cause. Add Romira R-ALA to your routine today.
